name: llm-memory-integration
description: LLM + 向量模型集成方案。支持任意 LLM + Embedding 模型，用户自行配置。支持混合检索、智能路由、渐进式启用、用户画像自动更新。
author: xkzs2007

binaries.description: Python 3 for running scripts, SQLite 3 for vector database

envVars.description: API keys for embedding and LLM services - must be configured by user

network.description: Calls to user-configured LLM and embedding API endpoints
